tiers.note: Not shown in matrix - appears blank

reserves.over_2m_la: 6 months - cash-out can be used to satisfy up to 50% of reserve requirement

recently_listed_with_cashout.value_determination: Lower of lowest listing price within 180 days or appraised value
recently_listed_with_cashout.ppp_required: 3 year minimum PPP required, transactions where PPP is prohibited are ineligible

select_dscr.foreign_national: Not Allowed - See Foreign National DSCR
select_dscr.gift_funds: 100% allowed with 10% LTV reduction from program Max LTV, no LTV reduction with min 5% buyer own funds. Gift of Equity not allowed.

interest_only.note: Not shown as available for Core DSCR in matrix

core_dscr.foreign_national: Not Allowed - See Foreign National DSCR

eligible_countries_regions: China (excluding Hong Kong) - as permitted by applicable state law
borrower_eligibility.ineligible: Citizens or individuals from countries subject to OFAC sanctions

tradeline_requirements.with_fico: Must meet minimum standard tradeline requirements. Limited tradelines not allowed.
tradeline_requirements.without_fico: 12 month credit rating from an internationally known financial institution in the borrower country of origin
tradeline_requirements.us_credit_report: US tri-merge credit report required for each borrower to verify credit or confirm no credit history

dscr_qualifying_ratio.fusion_formula: (Gross Income + Asset Utilization) / PITIA or ITIA
dscr_qualifying_ratio.gross_income_definition: Lower of estimated market rent from Form 1007 or monthly rent from existing lease with 2 months proof of receipt
dscr_qualifying_ratio.higher_rents_rule: If current rents are more than market rents, the lesser of actual rents or 125% of market rents used

interest_only: 30 Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 240 mos Amortization)
40 Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 360 mos Amortization)

experienced_investor.definition: Borrower(s) with history of owning & managing NOO income-producing investment real estate for at least 1 year within the last 3 years
notes: Only 1 borrower has to meet the Experienced Investor definition
Mortgage tradelines reflected on credit report paid off or sold in last 12 months can be used
All properties to meet above definitions must be domiciled in the US (Foreign National excluded)

inexperienced_investor.definition: Borrower without history of owning & managing NOO income-producing investment real estate for at least 1 year within the last 3 years

restrictions.reserves: Min 3 months, cash-out cannot be utilized

requirements.purchase_str_history: 12+ months STR rental history in last 3 years required for purchases
requirements.rent_documentation: Rents documented with 1007/1025 supported by 12 months history of payments OR AirDNA/Overview Report

lte_2m_loan_amount.cu_gt_2_5_or_no_score: Enhanced desk review (ARR, CCA or CDA) required, 10% variance allowed

standard: 3 tradelines reporting 12 months with activity in last 12 months
OR 2 tradelines reporting for 24 months with activity in last 12 months
OR 1 revolving tradeline reporting for 60 months with activity in last 12 months
OR 1 installment tradeline reporting for 36 months with activity in last 12 months
tradeline_requirements.three_credit_scores_rule: If each borrower has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is met (not available for ITINs)
tradeline_requirements.entity_closing: If member with highest percentage of ownership has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is met
tradeline_requirements.thin_credit_note: Borrower's credit scores primarily based on thin credit must still meet one of the standard tradeline requirements

additional_guidelines.declining_markets: > 70% LTV: Areas designated declining value on appraisal take 5% LTV reduction from program Max LTV
additional_guidelines.delayed_financing: > $1.5M loan amount, 70% max LTV/CLTV. Vacant/unleased > 3 months must follow unleased property LTV/CLTV restrictions
additional_guidelines.financed_property_limits: Unlimited financed properties. OCMBC exposure: $5.0M or 6 properties

geographic_restrictions.texas_sb17: Prohibits loans when borrower is restricted person connected to China, Russia, Iran, or North Korea. US citizens and Permanent Resident Aliens exempt. Non-Permanent Resident Aliens limited to primary residences only.
geographic_restrictions.arizona_sb1082: Prohibits loans when borrower or any >= 30% beneficial owner is classified as foreign adversary nation or agent

additional_guidelines.gift_funds: 100% allowed with 10% LTV reduction from program Max LTV. No LTV reduction required with min 5% buyer own funds. Gift of Equity not allowed for Select DSCR.
additional_guidelines.prepayment_penalty: Eligible for investment properties only where permitted by applicable state law and regulations

seasoning.cashout: >= 6 months ownership or since prior cash-out
seasoning.less_than_6_months: All borrowers on original Note at acquisition or prior cash-out must be on current Note. LTV based off lesser of purchase price + documented improvements (if acquired in past 6 months) or appraised value.

non_qm_full_and_alt_doc.program_name: Non-QM Full Doc and Alt Doc Programs

ltv_matrix.note: See Guides for Appraisal & Credit Overlay

reserves.base: 6 months minimum, cash-out cannot be utilized
reserves.additional_financed_properties: 2 months for each additional financed property (based on subject property PITIA)

housing_history.1x30x12: 5% LTV reduction, > $2.5M: 10% LTV reduction, $3.5M max LA
housing_history.1x60x12: 10% LTV reduction (must be 0 x 60 in most recent 6), > $2.5M: 15% LTV reduction, $3.0M max LA

credit_event_seasoning.gt_36_months: Standard (12 mos seasoning on discharged BK 13 or CCC w/pay history allowed)
credit_event_seasoning.gt_24_months: 10% LTV reduction, $3.5M max LA (discharged BK 13 or CCC w/pay history allowed)
credit_event_seasoning.gt_12_months: 15% LTV reduction, $3.0M max LA (discharged BK 13 or CCC allowed)

high_dti_50_to_55.restrictions: Full doc only, 6 months reserves, 80% max LTV, 660 min FICO, Primary only, Purchase only, $1.5M max LA

itin.income_types: Full Doc & 12 months Bank Statement only

all_occupancies.additional_financed_properties: 2 months for each additional financed property (based on subject property PITIA)

interest_only: 30 Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 240 mos Amortization)
40 Year Fixed IO (120 mos IO + 360 mos Amortization)

lte_2m_loan_amount.cu_gt_2_5_or_no_score: Enhanced desk review (ARR, CCA or CDA) required, 10% variance allowed

eligible_professionals.requirement: Postgraduate degree + at least 2 years current employment

standard: 3 tradelines reporting 12 months with activity in last 12 months
OR 2 tradelines reporting for 24 months with activity in last 12 months
OR 1 revolving tradeline reporting for 60 months with activity in last 12 months
OR 1 installment tradeline reporting for 36 months with activity in last 12 months
tradeline_requirements.trid: If primary wage earner has 3 credit scores reporting, minimum standard tradeline requirement is met
tradeline_requirements.non_trid_business_purpose: If each borrower has 3 credit scores, minimum tradeline requirement is met (not available for ITINs)
tradeline_requirements.entity_closing: If member with highest % ownership has 3 credit scores, requirement met
tradeline_requirements.thin_credit_note: Must still meet one of the standard tradeline requirements

additional_guidelines.high_dti_50_to_55: Full doc, 6 months reserves, 80% max LTV, 660 min FICO, Primary only, Purchase only, $1.5M max LA
additional_guidelines.debt_consolidation: Follows R/T Refi LTV w/80% max LTV, Owner Occupied only ($5k max cash in hand)
additional_guidelines.declining_markets: > 70% LTV: Areas designated declining value on appraisal take 5% LTV reduction from program max LTV

geographic_restrictions.texas_sb17: Prohibits loans when borrower is restricted person connected to China, Russia, Iran, or North Korea. US citizens and Permanent Resident Aliens exempt. Non-Permanent Resident Aliens limited to primary residences only.
geographic_restrictions.arizona_sb1082: Prohibits loans when borrower or any >= 30% beneficial owner is classified as foreign adversary nation or agent
geographic_restrictions.trid_non_business_purpose: Row Homes ineligible in Baltimore City, MD
geographic_restrictions.investment_and_non_trid: All subject properties in Baltimore City, MD (and neighborhoods) and Philadelphia County, PA temporarily ineligible

additional_guidelines.gift_funds: 100% allowed with 10% LTV reduction from max LTV. No LTV reduction with min 5% buyer own funds. Gift of Equity not allowed on Select Non-QM.
additional_guidelines.financed_property_limits: 20 financed properties including subject. OCMBC exposure: $5.0M or 6 properties.

first_time_homebuyers.investment: Purchase & Refinance: Full Doc and Bank Statement income only, 80% Max LTV, 660 Min FICO, 50% Max DTI, $1.5M Max LA

additional_guidelines.non_occupant_co_borrower: Purchase, Rate & Term & Core Non-QM only
additional_guidelines.prepayment_penalty: Eligible for investment properties only where permitted by applicable state law and regulations

seasoning.cashout: >= 6 months ownership or since prior cash-out
seasoning.less_than_6_months: All borrowers on original Note at acquisition or prior cash-out must be on current Note. LTV based off lesser of purchase price + documented improvements (if acquired in past 6 months) or appraised value.

full_doc_primary_residence.notes: Select Non-QM also allows Full Doc but max LTV is lower (85% purchase)

alt_doc_bank_statements.notes: Part of Alt Doc income types

assets_as_blended_income.description: Assets as Blended Income - Alt Doc type

dscr_standard.qualifying: Gross Income (market rent from 1007 or lease rent) / PITIA or ITIA

rent_documentation: 1007/1025 supported by 12 months history of payments
dscr_short_term_rental.purchase_requirement: 12+ months STR rental history in last 3 years (if < 12 months, additional 5% LTV reduction)

str_rural.note: Rural not allowed for STR on any DSCR program

cumulative_adjustments_note: All adjustments on this matrix are cumulative. All LTV calculations start from the highest LTV allowed per product.
